_description: Reference: dynamic form block (W4.1 + W3.3). Server-side validation + storage in form_submissions. 8 base field types plus W3.3's phone-validated + address-autocomplete (use per-tenant Google Maps browser keys via render-time injection — agents never see the key, server injects props._googleBrowserKey at render).

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone
fields._note: W3.3 — uses Google Maps libphonenumber via per-tenant key

fields.name: address
fields.label: Address
fields._note: W3.3 — autocomplete via per-tenant Google Places key

_anti_patterns: Do NOT include `_googleBrowserKey` or any `_*`-prefixed prop in your authored payload — `content_service._strip_render_time_props_from_blocks` wipes them on every write. The renderer injects the key server-side at render time only.
phone-validated and address-autocomplete require the tenant to have set up `content_settings.map_providers` in the dashboard. Without that, the field renders as plain text/tel.
Field type `'phone'` (no `-validated` suffix) is the unvalidated tel input. The W3.3 validator only runs when type='phone-validated' is set explicitly.
